channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Tether Says It Will Be Audited By Big Four Accounting Firm—But Won't Say Which One
item.description: The first independent audit of Tether’s claimed $192 billion stablecoin reserves could pave the way to USDT’s approval under the GENIUS Act.

item.title: Wall Street's Crypto Ties Deepen as NYSE Taps Securitize for Tokenized Securities
item.description: Securitize was selected by the New York Stock Exchange as a "digital transfer agent" for a platform dedicated to tokenized securities.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Fira launches fixed-rate DeFi lending market with $450M in deposits
item.description: Fira debuted its fixed-rate DeFi lending protocol with $450 million in pre-launch deposits, seeking to make long-term decentralized lending rates more predictable.

item.title: Resolv temporarily halts protocol to ‘contain the impact’ of 80M USR exploit
item.description: Resolv’s USR dollar stablecoin is trading at just $0.24 after an attacker minted 80 million unbacked tokens, forcing a full protocol pause and reopening fears over stablecoin risk.

item.title: Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay Building With New Solana Enterprise Platform
item.description: Major financial players are building via the Solana Developer Platform, which is meant to streamline enterprise development on the network.

item.title: Federal regulation looms as 11 states go after prediction markets
item.description: Kalshi is facing off with state regulators around the US, who claim that prediction markets are a form of gambling and recognize that they are a significant source of potential revenue.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Polkadot (DOT) drops 2.3% as index trades lower
item.description: Ripple (XRP), down 1.3% since Monday, was also among the underperformers.

item.title: Tether hires a 'Big Four' firm for a full audit of USDT reserves
item.description: The audit aims to address long-standing questions over USDT reserves and push new disclosure standards.

item.title: Bitcoin may have already bottomed out near $60,000. Here’s why.
item.description: Implied volatility indicators DVOL and BVIV suggest peak fear has passed, with crypto leading traditional markets in pricing risk.

item.title: NYSE taps Securitize for 24/7 tokenized securities platform
item.description: Securitize will become NYSE’s first digital transfer agent to mint blockchain-based shares of stocks and develop standards for compliant tokenized stock issuance.

item.title: Chainalysis Joins Solana Developer Platform to Bring Real-Time Compliance to Every Builder
item.description: Chainalysis is proud to be a compliance partner for Solana Developer Platform (SDP), integrating Chainalysis KYT (Know Your Transaction) directly… The post Chainalysis Joins Solana Developer Platform to Bring Real-Time Compliance to Every …

item.title: Solana Foundation taps Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay for institutional developer platform
item.description: The platform is a toolkit that lets enterprises create and scale financial applications on Solana without deep crypto infrastructure expertise.

item.title: Solana lands Mastercard, Western Union on new dev platform
item.description: Solana is aiming to attract enterprises and financial institutions to its ecosystem through a new unified developer platform, which is focused on tokenization and stablecoins.

item.title: Solana Foundation Launches Solana Developer Platform
item.description: Solana Foundation launches Solana Developer Platform, a unified API platform for institutions and enterprises building on Solana.

item.title: Why Mastercard is buying stablecoin infrastructure instead of a token
item.description: Mastercard’s planned BVNK acquisition highlights a shift toward infrastructure over token issuance, reflecting how major payment firms are approaching stablecoins.

item.title: Yeah bitcoin ETFs now $2.5b for month and one good day away from completely digging out of their YTD flow hole. $IBIT is already there and then some, in top 2% among all ETFs in YTD flows. Again, incredible fortitude in face of 40% 6mo price drop and wid - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1pVHZ0QTRPTFBxTk95d2diNmk0cWpiemRRb2JNb0ZrYzk4SjNwcmtvajQzNmtqcFg3bWRTRDY0QmhDSFFnY3RRRUc0VFZINFBvdEVoQ1VVazktdVVTMlBaS3ZyUS0?oc=5" target="_blank">Yeah bitcoin ETFs now $2.5b for…

item.title: Coinbase says the 'second wave' of institutional money for crypto is here and it is all about yield
item.description: Coinbase’s head of institutional, Brett Tejpaul, says institutional priorities in crypto are evolving, and investors are increasingly hunting for yield.

item.title: Wall Street broker Bernstein calls bitcoin bottom, keeps $150,000 year-end target
item.description: The broker sees bitcoin rebounding from its recent lows, supported by ETF flows and expanding corporate treasury demand.

item.title: Bittensor Leads AI Altcoin Surge as Short Squeeze, Conflicting Iran Talks Claims Fuel Volatility
item.description: AI altcoins notched double-digit gains amid conflict-related volatility, buoyed by last week's Nvidia GTC conference.

item.title: Omnes, Apex to tokenize Bitcoin mining exposure via structured note on Base
item.description: Omnes and Apex plan to issue a tokenized Bitcoin mining debt note on Base, giving eligible non-US investors exposure to hashrate-linked returns.

item.title: ParaFi defies crypto market downturn with $125 million raise for new fund: Bloomberg
item.description: The firm now manages about $2 billion, having already raised an additional $325 million for existing crypto investment strategies since last year.

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Students in mainland China being taught lessons on Bitcoin earlier this year 🇨🇳 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5sZ0ZzcWRYVUk2a2Y2RlIwc3k2N3gySU5jS0w5WWh2OFVPdjh2UkstbC1lalVHWkdyRUhZMXdfblJNQW9CcGlpNnZwb0hXSlpvRVI3SW9aM3o5TV85TkRIeDNZRWFROFE?oc=5" target="_blank">EXCLUSIVE: Students in main…

item.title: New York Stock Exchange taps Securitize to build its tokenized stock platform
item.description: The move comes as the race to bring equities to always-on blockchain markets is heating up after Nasdaq obtained regulatory approval for its tokenization plan.

item.title: Wall Street will eventually submit to the rules of DeFi
item.description: Wall Street won’t tame DeFi. Regulation creates compliant tiers atop permissionless liquidity, forcing TradFi to adopt DeFi’s superior speed and composability.

item.title: AI and stablecoins are winning despite 2026 crypto market slump
item.description: Data shows AI tokens and stablecoins held up better than other crypto sectors in 2026, with growth tied to usage, liquidity and infrastructure demand.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor Gains Access to Another $44B to Buy Bitcoin
item.description: Strategy just unveiled a $44 billion war chest to keep buying Bitcoin, while Congress is moving to ban sports bets on prediction markets.

item.title: FSB flags dollar stablecoins as bigger risk for emerging markets in annual report
item.description: US dollar-denominated stablecoins may expose emerging economies to external macro shocks and financial stability risks, according to the Financial Stability Board.

item.title: BITCOIN BOTTOM IN, $MSTR HOLDS STRONG Bernstein says Bitcoin has likely bottomed and is set to rise, keeping a $150K price target for 2026. Despite a 50% drop from its peak, Strategy (MSTR) has remained resilient, now holding 3.6% of total Bitcoin su - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9UdDlOM2g0ajM4ZXpETW5oRDVPSlozMHhpZGptSGpzMFhlSGl1LWx3RjdZQlIwbjNiZUJCNTFoWDgxMXdEVmhHYVZJX25QTXdqYmY0NUlyUlFraW1FaGc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN BOTTOM IN, $MSTR HOLDS STRONG B…

item.title: BitGo, Susquehanna Crypto offering institutional OTC access to prediction markets
item.description: New partnership lets hedge funds and other large investors trade event contracts using crypto collateral held on BitGo’s platform.

item.title: Bitcoin finds stability at 2023 investor cost basis, echoing past cycle
item.description: Onchain cost basis data suggests $60,000 is a critical support, with deeper historical support near $54,000.

item.title: Invesco joins tokenization race as it takes over Superstate’s $900 million onchain fund
item.description: The $2.2 trillion asset manager is stepping into the rapidly-growing tokenized Treasury market, joining global financial behemoths like BlackRock and Franklin Templeton.

item.title: The $75,000 line in the sand: What it’ll take for bitcoin to go "full bull"
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 24, 2026

item.title: MoonPay Launches Open-Source Wallet Standard for AI Agents
item.description: The payments infrastructure firm has unveiled an open-source framework enabling AI agents to manage crypto funds across multiple chains.

item.title: Crypto-friendly fintech Revolut sees profit soar 57% to $2.3 billion in 2025
item.description: The company's customer base grew to 68.3 million, with total balances up 66% to $67.5 billion and transaction volume reaching $1.7 trillion.

item.title: Zama integrates with Apex-backed T-REX for private tokenized assets
item.description: Cryptography startup Zama is plugging its privacy tech into T‑REX in a bid to let banks and asset managers trade sensitive assets on public blockchains without losing confidentiality.

item.title: Siren token slides 70% after analysts flag concentrated holdings
item.description: Onchain analyst EmberCN warned that Siren’s rally may stem from one party cornering spot supply to profit via derivatives.

item.title: What happens to Bitcoin if US bond yields soar above 5%?
item.description: Past oil-war shocks lifted inflation and hurt risk appetite, which raises the risk of Bitcoin falling below $50,000 in 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin leads crypto rebound to $71,000 as $550 million in shorts liquidated
item.description: BTC climbs despite escalating Middle East tensions, outperforming gold as altcoins rally and derivatives data signals cautious but improving market sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin value ‘off the chart’ as BTC price metric hits record lows in 2026
item.description: Bitcoin Yardstick data confirmed a new record for BTC price "deep value" in February as miners battled the lowest price levels in 15 months.

item.title: Fund services giant Apex to tokenize Bitcoin mining note on Coinbase’s Base platform
item.description: Apex will tokenize the Omnes Mining Note “OMN,” an institutional-grade structured note backed by Bitcoin hashrate.

item.title: ECB says stablecoins, tokenized deposits need central bank money to scale
item.description: ECB Executive Board member Piero Cipollone said private digital money cannot scale Europe’s tokenized markets on its own, pointing to Pontes and broader legal reform as next steps.

item.title: Nasdaq, Talos target collateral bottleneck in institutional tokenization push
item.description: Nasdaq is wiring its collateral and surveillance systems into Talos’s institutional trading stack to target a $35 billion “trapped” collateral problem.

item.title: OKX Rolls Out Round the Clock Trading for Mag Seven Stocks Using Crypto Collateral
item.description: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.

item.title: Aave DAO backs V4 mainnet plan in near-unanimous vote
item.description: Aave founder Stani Kulechov says the proposal will move to a binding onchain vote to formalize V4’s deployment on Ethereum.

item.title: As the #crypto markets continue to remain volatile, SB Seker, head of APAC, @binance , said #India - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE8wT0hpOHMxZVRMUUVWbFZCZ3hNdWRQWExiSUhOUDEwVGJ2bmhaUkQ3a1pGbXdqbFc1NlBKN1JicXVSZTlmV1ZRYUVGRXhBYlJrUjBRMlQxeDJDb2hnTXpUNmln?oc=5" target="_blank">As the #crypto markets continue to…

item.title: As mass adoption approaches, crypto has forgotten its roots
item.description: Mass adoption risks crypto’s cypherpunk roots. Privacy as a permissionless foundation must reclaim DeFi from surveillance, TradFi and memecoin casinos.

item.title: Here’s how Treasuries could shape Trump’s Iran war and bitcoin moves
item.description: Treasury yields and swap spreads could eventually pressure the Trump administration to moderate the conflict, analysts argue.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: Three banks have applied to run crypto exchanges in Vietnam, South Korean lawmakers push to overturn 22% crypto tax, and more. Asia Express via Cointelegraph Magazine - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE92Mm1Tdzc5NExUWXJUWjN0TnVudHUtVkNESmxpd1ZucVNOY080Ym1vaGpXQnEzNFJvNFJCWll3WFhCQkJuWUJ1elZiVjBiRWFvdTkwZGR2VVNHb2cyVE9tbHd4UHM?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: Three banks have app…

item.title: SEC’s top enforcer clashed over Trump cases before quitting: Report
item.description: The SEC’s handling of cases involving Justin Sun and Elon Musk was among the factors that caused the agency’s top enforcement official to quit, according to sources.

item.title: Balancer Labs will shut down as corporate entity became 'a liability' after $110 million exploit
item.description: Co-founder Fernando Martinelli said he considered winding down the entire protocol but decided the team deserved a chance to restructure, with the DAO targeting zero emissions, fee restructuring, and a BAL buyback to offer holders a fair e…

item.title: 21M+ merchants already accept @binance payments. Crypto is becoming the global standard for commerce. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9jM1BvVFpDOW52YTJmaFdldkhYWWRZTjRZZldHRTduV1hONDFfeFNyVWU2YUlXcllBbHJ6QTRIUXZhVmk0THVfVnJyTWliaWVTNDI4UGs5ZjRWT2FnUEJncnBVWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">21M+ merchants already accept @b…

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana prices move higher as Gulf allies inch toward joining Iran war
item.description: Crypto recovered on Tuesday morning even as Monday's relief rally unraveled across traditional markets, with oil jumping 4% on reports that Saudi Arabia and the UAE are moving to join the conflict.

item.title: Australian Pension Fund Weighs Crypto Access Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Hostplus’s crypto ambition is attempting to meet rising investor demand, even as volatility keeps rivals on the sidelines.

item.title: Balancer Labs Winds Down Months After $128M DeFi Exploit
item.description: The restructuring comes as analysts say older DeFi models built on token incentives and emissions are increasingly under pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin's mining concentration just showed up in a rare 2-block reorg
item.description: A 2-block reorg at height 941,881 saw Foundry's chain overwrite blocks from AntPool and ViaBTC, coming days after mining difficulty dropped nearly 8%.

item.title: 🚨NEW: New details are emerging about the latest legislative text outlining a compromise on stablecoin yield and rewards, along with early reactions from crypto industry leaders who reviewed it today. According to an internal stakeholder email shared with me, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFAwa0NGSHpLR1BjYTBFX0JJZk84TDRybHUzT1BwVVFSQ2hFR3RtcXNQYm8tMDVpVTRWSlJjal9BaVFWcEM1QU9zWjE4cldXZWhkbHdIdnJiNDc2am1IbXp0QUs3ZVlGQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: New details are emerg…

item.title: 🇺🇸 TODAY: The SEC submits proposed crypto interpretation framework to White House for review, seeking to clarify which digital assets qualify as securities under federal law. - x.com

item.title: ⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation outlines L1-L2 strategy with L1 serving as resilient settlement hub while L2s drive differentiation and customization for thriving ecosystem. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBVbXV4LVBQVUVmc2xialBjbjhVeE1fSXhLX0EtQkNiQlNGZmkyT2hLOEJ1SlR6YXk0MXV2UnBOdm15OWV2SEl3TUIwZGZJSlN2bGY1eURKQlBzei12WGh4YkpEOUY?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation out…

item.title: Protesters Rally Outside OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI Offices Over Industry Concerns
item.description: Protesters marched between the San Francisco offices of major AI developers, calling for a pause in the development of more powerful AI systems.
